meta.title: Aura Syncro — Restaurant cloud software | Italy, Spain & Canary Islands
meta.description: SaaS restaurant management for Italy, Spain and the Canary Islands. QR menu, order and table management, Stripe payments, VAT/IGIC fiscal reports. Try Aura Syncro.

hero.title: The management platform that keeps your restaurant in sync
hero.subtitle: {{brand}} is cloud software for restaurants in Italy, Spain and the Canary Islands: fast POS, QR menu, real-time orders and multi-country fiscal compliance.
hero.demoError: Demo launch error: unable to connect.

features.title: Everything you need during service
features.subtitle: From dining room to kitchen, digital menu to fiscal reporting — one synchronized platform.

tables.title: Table management
tables.desc: Floor plan, table status and fast order entry for waiters — zero lag at peak hours.

qrMenu.title: Digital QR menu
qrMenu.desc: Guests browse the menu on their phone in the dining room. Waiters handle all orders.

stripe.title: Stripe payments
stripe.desc: Collect at the table or online with cards and digital wallets, integrated into orders.

fiscal.title: Fiscal reports
fiscal.desc: VAT in Italy, mainland Spain and IGIC in the Canaries — exports ready for e-invoicing.

crm.title: CRM and loyalty
crm.desc: Customer profiles, tags, allergies and targeted campaigns to boost repeat visits and average spend.

ai.title: Predictive AI
ai.desc: Forecast covers and consumption to plan staffing, purchasing and production with better accuracy.

gallery.title: The real challenges of every service
gallery.subtitle: When dining room, kitchen and back office don't talk, you lose margin every night — before you even close the till.

p1.title: Too many tools, zero sync
p1.desc: POS, reservations, delivery and inventory live in separate worlds. Double entry, floor errors and data that never adds up.

p2.title: Platforms erode your margin
p2.desc: Up to 30% on every delivery order. The customers are yours — the profit goes elsewhere.

p3.title: Fiscal compliance slows you down
p3.desc: Receipts, tax reporting and e-invoicing demand absolute precision. Every mistake can mean fines and accountant stress.

pricing.title: Clear plans for every growth stage
pricing.subtitle: Turnkey setup and transparent monthly billing. No surprises.

starter.name: Starter
starter.tagline: For small venues or food trucks.

pro.name: Premium
pro.tagline: For restaurants that demand the best.
pro.conciergeNote: This plan includes Concierge service: personalized 2.5D floor mapping and digital menu setup by our technical team before go-live.

concierge.title: A frictionless start
concierge.subtitle: Our technical team configures your real floor plan and digital menu before go-live. You will never be left alone with complex setup.
concierge.heading: Exclusive Concierge Service
concierge.body: Setup is not a hidden cost — it is your passport to immediate operations. Our experts map your restaurant in 2.5D, digitize the full menu, variants and fiscal printers. We deliver a turnkey system, ready to sell from minute one.

demoModal.title: Book a Private Demo
demoModal.subtitle: Pick a day and time. A specialist will review your restaurant with you.

footer.tagline: Cloud software for restaurants in Italy, Spain and the Canary Islands.

pricing.title: Aura Syncro Pricing | Restaurant cloud software
pricing.description: Premium all-inclusive plan for structured restaurants: turnkey setup and subscription from €199/month. Italy, Spain and Canary Islands.

contact.title: Contact Aura Syncro | Support and demo
contact.description: Contact the Aura Syncro team for demos, Premium onboarding and technical support.
